'''Kwookrrr''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Youngling/Legends|children]] for labor in factories and farms. It had previously been a Wookiee colony world.
